name: clue-skillaton
description: Clue murder mystery game with AI agent skills for Skillathon hackathon

scripts.validate-skills: bash .agents/skills/skill/scripts/validate_skill.sh skills/clue-moderator && bash .agents/skills/skill/scripts/validate_skill.sh skills/clue-player && bash .agents/skills/skill/scripts/validate_skill.sh skills/clue-assistant
